title: A method, a server for providing an interactive environment for a learning process, a computer program product and a computer readable storage medium
abstract: The disclosure relates to a method, performed in at least one server (1), for storing content and providing an interactive environment for a learning process, the interactive environment being accessible by at least a first user, the method comprising: sending (S3), to a first electronic device (2), content based on identification information of the first user, wherein the content is associated with the learning process for the first user; wherein the content comprises a lesson schedule with lessons specifying each subject according to a curriculum associated with the first user; receiving (S4), from the first electronic device (2), a request for information regarding a specific subject; determining (S5), based on the request for information, the identification information of the first user, and the curriculum associated with the first user, what information regarding the specific subject is relevant information for the first user; determining (S6) a specific digital education material associated with the determined relevant information; sending (S7) the subject specific information to the electronic device; and sending (S8) at least a link to the specific digital education material. The disclosure further relates to a server (1) for providing an interactive environment for a learning process, a computer program product and a computer readable storage medium.
claims:
Claims 1. A method, performed in at least one server (1), for storing content and providing an interactive environment for a learning process, the interactive environment being accessible by at least a first user, the method comprising: sending (SB), to a first electronic device (2), content based on identification information of the first user, wherein the content is associated with the learning process for the first user; wherein the content comprises a lesson schedule with lessons specifying each subject according to a curriculum associated with the first user; receiving (S4), from the first electronic device (2), a request for information regarding a specific subject; determining (S5), based on the request for information, the identification information of the first user, and the curriculum associated with the first user, what information regarding the specific subject is relevant information for the first user; determining (S6) a specific digital education material associated with the determined relevant information; sending (S7) the subject specific information to the first electronic device; and sending (S8) at least a link to the specific digital education material the first electronic device (2). 2. The method according to claim 1, further comprising opening (S10) the specific digital education material on the first electronic device to enable viewing of the specific digital education material on a display of the first electronic device (2). 3. The method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the specific digital education material is a live video or audio stream of education. 4. The method according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising receiving and storing (S9) the complete specific digital education material associated with the determined relevant information from the at least one server at the electronic device. 5. The method according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the specific digital education material is comprised in a group consisting of: a video material, an audio file, 

an image file, a word processing document, a portable document format file, a spread sheet document file and a presentation. 6. The method according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising sending (Sll) a request to a second user device (3) associated with a second user notifying the second user of the request for information by the first electronic device; receiving input, from the second user, regarding relevant specific digital education material associated with the determined relevant information. 7. The method according to claim 6, further comprising receiving (S12) a personal message from the second user intended for the first user, the personal message comprising information regarding the subject specific information or the specific digital education material. 8. The method according to claim 7, wherein the personal message is a text message, pre-recorded audio message, a prerecorded video message, a live video call or a live audio call. 9. The method according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising comparing (S13) information regarding what subject specific information has been handled during lessons with the curriculum associated with the first user; and determining whether the first user is in phase with the curriculum; further basing the determination of the subject specific information or the specific digital education material on the determination whether the first user is in phase with the curriculum. 10. The method according to any one of claims 6-9, wherein the second user is a teacher and the method further comprises: receiving (S7-2) a lesson plan from the teacher regarding at least one lesson of a subject; and receiving (S8-2) a specific digital education material associated with the lesson; updating (S9-2) stored subject specific information based on the lesson plan and linking the specific digital education material. 11. The method according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the first user is a student and wherein the method further comprises: receiving (S14) an interactive digital test from the teacher regarding a specific subject; and updating (S15) stored subject specific information by associating the interactive digital test. 12. The method according to claim 11, further comprising providing (S16) the interactive digital test for one or a plurality of specific subjects to the first electronic device, receiving (S17) answers to each test from the first electronic device entered by the student. 13. The method according to claim 12, further comprising continuously checking (S18) the identity of the student during the test by using a camera of the first electronic device and facial recognition. 14. A server (1) for providing an interactive environment for a learning process, the interactive environment being accessible by at least one user, the server comprising: a communication interface (11); processing circuitry (12) configured to cause the server (1) to execute the method steps of any one of the preceding claims. 15. A computer program product comprising instructions adapted to carry out the method of any one of claims 1-14. 16. A computer readable storage medium comprising a computer program product according to claim 15.
